summary: The define phase (iteration 2) for 'Human in the Loop Pause' produced only documentation artifacts under .pipeliner/ (requirements.md, open_questions.md, discovery_notes.md, and step metadata) — no source code, migrations, config, or other runnable/testable changes. `git status` shows only this step's own input.json as modified, and the define-phase commits touch exclusively .pipeliner/** files, so there is nothing to build, test, or lint. The target repository is also the live control plane orchestrating this run with a shared development database, so per the step's safety rule the Rails test suite/db tasks must not be invoked here regardless. No test command was run.
